title: scarmy
description: A whimsical and adventure heavy modpack, for creature and create lovers
body:
Welcome to the Scarmy Modpack!

This Modpack seeks to satisfy most players, from the builder, to the explorer, to the redstoner ansd many more. 

With mods such as Ice and Fire, Mythic Mounts and Fossils and Archeology you will be able to raise and tame countless creatures. 

Biomes O'Plenty, Regions unexplored and terralith create a unique and ambient world to build in and explore. The world would not be complete without decor, so we have chipped, bits and chisels, all the macaws mods and much more to make decorating and building more exciting. 

The create mod and Ad Astra will challenge technical players to bend the rules of minecraft. 

There is so much more to explore in this modpack, without gettig too overwhelmed.
